plan_status: adopted; draft-plan chapter captured from Cork's own consultation portal
portal: consult.corkcity.ie (Cork runs its own portal, separate from the shared consult.* service)
fetch_method: WebFetch on consult.corkcity.ie chapter (clean markdown) + curl.exe raw HTML saved to raw/dm_standards.html
notes: Cork has no chapter literally named 'Development Management Standards'; the DM standards live in Chapter 11 'Placemaking and Managing Development'. Captured numeric standards: density by area (dwellings/ha), dwelling size mix, open space 15%/10%, private amenity 48 sqm, separation ~22m, apartment glazing 20%, daylight assessment >50 units, RIA >1000 sqm. Rural one-off site area NOT quantified (Cork City is urban). Numeric car-parking ratios, plot ratio, site coverage, EV and bin standards were not present as tables in the captured chapter text. Captured text is from the draft-plan chapter on Cork's portal (adopted plan content is materially the same).
